udt_struct_v0.doc: NAVResult type \xe2\x80\x94 mirrors PositionRegistry's return value.\nRedeclared here since cross-contract calls in Soroban pass data as XDR,\nand both sides must have matching layouts.
udt_struct_v0.name: NAVResult

function_v0.doc: Get the admin address.
function_v0.name: get_admin

function_v0.doc: Get the current nonce (number of reports sent).
function_v0.name: get_nonce

function_v0.doc: Check if the contract is paused.
function_v0.name: is_paused

function_v0.doc: Get the spoke configuration.
function_v0.name: get_config

function_v0.doc: Get a specific report by nonce.
function_v0.name: get_report

function_v0.doc:
Initialize the SpokeReporter contract.

# Arguments
- `admin` \xe2\x80\x94 Admin address (controls configuration)
- `spoke_id` \xe2\x80\x94 Unique spoke identifier (e.g., "stellar-main")
- `chain_id` \xe2\x80\x94 Chain identifier (e.g., "stellar")
- `position_registry` \xe2\x80\x94 Address of the PositionRegistry contract (WS2)
- `gateway` \xe2\x80\x94 Address of the Axelar Gateway contract
- `hub_chain` \xe2\x80\x94 Destination chain name for Axelar (e.g., "near")
- `hub_address` \xe2\x80\x94 Destination contract address on NEAR hub
- `account` \xe2\x80\x94 The vault account whose NAV is computed
function_v0.name: initialize

function_v0.doc: Pause or unpause the contract. Admin only.
function_v0.name: set_paused

function_v0.doc:
Compute NAV via PositionRegistry and send it to the NEAR Hub via Axelar GMP.

Anyone can call this (permissionless \xe2\x80\x94 heartbeat keeper script calls it).
Enforces minimum interval between reports. Returns the nonce.

# Flow
1. Check not paused
2. Check minimum interval since last report
3. Call PositionRegistry.compute_nav(account)
4. Increment nonce
5. Build JSON payload matching CrossChainMessage format (WS4/WS5)
6. Send via Axelar gateway.call_contract(hub_chain, hub_address, payload)
7. Store ReportRecord in history
8. Return nonce
function_v0.name: send_report

function_v0.doc: Update the Axelar gateway address. Admin only.
function_v0.name: set_gateway

function_v0.doc:
Accept a pending admin proposal (step 2 of two-step transfer).

Must be called by the `pending_admin` address. Overwrites the current admin
with `pending_admin` and clears the pending slot.
function_v0.name: accept_admin

function_v0.doc:
Propose a new admin (step 1 of two-step transfer). Admin only. (MEDIUM-01)

Writes the `PendingAdmin` storage key without overwriting the current admin.
The new admin must call `accept_admin()` to complete the transfer.
This prevents permanent lock-out from a typo or misrouted address.
function_v0.name: propose_admin

function_v0.doc:
Extend the persistent storage TTL for a specific report record. Admin only.

# Arguments
- `nonce` \xe2\x80\x94 The report nonce identifying the record
- `min_ttl` \xe2\x80\x94 Minimum TTL in ledgers; only extends if current TTL is at or below this
- `max_ttl` \xe2\x80\x94 Target TTL in ledgers to set when extension triggers
function_v0.name: extend_report_ttl

function_v0.doc: Get the latest report.
function_v0.name: get_latest_report

function_v0.doc: Get NAV staleness \xe2\x80\x94 seconds since the last NAV was reported.\n\nReturns u64::MAX if no NAV has ever been reported (always stale).
function_v0.name: get_nav_staleness

function_v0.doc: Get the report configuration (min interval, accounting token).
function_v0.name: get_report_config

function_v0.doc: Set the report configuration. Admin only.
function_v0.name: set_report_config

function_v0.doc: Get report history (up to `limit` most recent reports).
function_v0.name: get_report_history

function_v0.doc:
Extend the instance storage TTL. Admin only.

# Arguments
- `min_ttl` \xe2\x80\x94 Minimum TTL in ledgers; only extends if current TTL is at or below this
- `max_ttl` \xe2\x80\x94 Target TTL in ledgers to set when extension triggers
function_v0.name: extend_instance_ttl

function_v0.doc: Update the hub destination (chain + address). Admin only.
function_v0.name: set_hub_destination

function_v0.doc: Get the timestamp of the last report sent.\nReturns 0 if no report has been sent yet.
function_v0.name: get_last_report_time

function_v0.doc:
Update the PositionRegistry address. Admin only. (B6)

Allows replacing PositionRegistry without redeploying SpokeReporter.
Emits a RegistryChanged event with old and new addresses for on-chain auditability.
function_v0.name: set_position_registry

udt_struct_v0.doc: NAVReport \xe2\x80\x94 the cross-chain message payload.\nFields match the CrossChainMessage struct on the NEAR side (WS4/WS5).
udt_struct_v0.name: NAVReport

udt_struct_v0.doc: Configuration for the spoke reporter \xe2\x80\x94 where to send reports.
udt_struct_v0.name: SpokeConfig

fields.doc: The vault account whose NAV is computed
fields.name: account

fields.doc: Address of the Axelar Gateway contract on this chain
fields.name: gateway

fields.doc: Destination contract address on the hub chain
fields.name: hub_address

fields.doc: Address of the PositionRegistry contract on this chain
fields.name: position_registry

udt_struct_v0.doc: Configuration for report timing and format.
udt_struct_v0.name: ReportConfig

udt_struct_v0.doc: Record of a sent report \xe2\x80\x94 stored in contract history.
udt_struct_v0.name: ReportRecord

cases.doc: Reports are being sent too frequently (min interval not met).
cases.name: TooFrequent

cases.doc: No reports have been sent yet.
cases.name: NoReportsYet

cases.doc: Report not found for the given nonce.
cases.name: ReportNotFound

cases.doc: min_ttl is greater than max_ttl in TTL extension calls.
cases.name: InvalidTtlArgs

udt_union_v0.doc: Storage keys for the SpokeReporter contract.
udt_union_v0.name: StorageKeys

void_v0.doc: Timestamp of the last NAV computation/report (u64)
void_v0.name: LastNavTimestamp

tuple_v0.doc: Report record by nonce (stored in persistent storage)
tuple_v0.name: Report
